error_signature: blank screen due to missing/blocked frontend asset
title: UI not loading due to incorrect asset paths
symptom: The n8n UI does not display anything, resulting in a blank screen. This issue is often caused by the frontend assets being loaded from incorrect paths.
applies_when: Incorrect paths set in environment variables
not_this_if: UI loads correctly on local access
root_cause: The UI fails to load because the paths for the frontend assets are incorrectly configured in the environment variables. This can happen if systemd overrides the settings in the `.env` file, leading to the browser receiving HTML instead of the expected JS/CSS files.
fix_steps: Edit the override file located at /etc/systemd/system/n8n.service.d/override.conf to set the correct paths for N8N_PATH, WEBHOOK_URL, and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL.
Run 'sudo systemctl daemon-reload' to apply the changes.
Restart n8n with 'sudo systemctl restart n8n'.
Check the local UI to ensure the correct asset paths are being used.
agent_instruction: Update the environment variables in the systemd override file and restart n8n.
